content:
I need to analyze the code to identify which files/classes belong to a `plugins` package, then count relations within that package.

Looking through all the code provided, I can see files belonging to these packages based on their import paths and locations:
- `mermaid/` related files (auto-repair, comment-generator, diagram-generator, etc.)
- `parsers/` related files (class-extractor, interface-extractor, etc.)

There is no `plugins` package represented in any of the code above. No files have paths containing `plugins`, no imports reference a `plugins` package, and no entities are identified as belonging to a `plugins` namespace.

{"answer": 0}
